Web Design & Build · Print — 2024

Westgarth
Auto

Client

Westgarth Auto

Sector

MOT & Repairs — Dalgety Bay, Fife

Scope

Website Design · Website Build · Print / Stationery

The Brief

Westgarth Auto is an MOT and repairs garage in Dalgety Bay, Fife. The brief was simple — a website local customers can find, trust, and use to get in touch. Book an MOT, request a quote, check the hours. Nothing complicated. The site just needed to do that job without getting in the way.

Delivered alongside the site: business cards and letterhead. All files handed over print-ready.

Specification

SiteFully coded. Services, contact, booking prompt. Mobile-responsive.
StackHTML, CSS, JavaScript.
PrintBusiness cards and letterhead. Print-ready files supplied to client.
OutcomeLive and trading. Local search presence established.
